title: Aye Aye Aye Lyrics Aambala Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Aye Aye Aye Song Lyrics From Aambala
Singer: Hip Hop Tamizha
Music : Hip Hop Tamizha

Unmaiyaana kadhal engae
Thaedipaarthaen ulagathiley
Kannai mayakkum pengal ingae
Unnai kandu naanum vilundhaen.

Pennellaam poiyyaa
Enmel kadhal illaya.
Ne sollaadha sollil
Naan vazhavillayaa !

Adi unnai kandu
Kadhal kondu
Nenjam saaigiradhey.

Aye aye aye
Aye aye aye
Neethaan en kadhal endru sollava

Aye aye aye
Aye aye aye
Unnai mattum naanum allikollavaa

Adi ne sellum podhu
En kadhal theeraadhu.
Ne enai vittu sendraal
En nenjam thaangaadhu.

Uyir ponaalum poga
Ne ennodu vazha
Vendum vendum neeye venum
Endre nenjam solludhey.

Unai mattum paathirukka
En nenjam konjam thaan kaakkumaa.

Ennai nee paarkkum podhu
Un kangal nenjai thaan thaakkumaa.

Penne naam irukkum indha
Iravile oru inimaithaan.
Unnil naan vandhu
Kondaadum neramallavaa.

Unnai paththi pesum podhu
Endhan nenjam unjal aadum.
Enmel kadhal kattru veesa
Nenjam panju pola maarum.

Penne, podhum podhum endru
Neeyum poigal pesinaalum.
Unnai pattrimattum thaan
Ninaikkum nenjam thaan
Vaa Kadhal seidhidave.

Aye aye aye
Aye aye aye
Neethaan en kadhal endru sollava

Aye aye aye
Aye aye aye
Unnai mattum naanum allikollavaa

Adi ne sellum podhu
En kadhal theeraadhu.
Ne enai vittu sendraal
En nenjam thaangaadhu.

Uyir ponaalum poga
Ne ennodu vazha

Unnai mattum naanum
Nenjil ninaithida vaa
Undhan ninaivugalaal nenjam
Nirapidavaa.
Ninaithida nenjam mattum
Maruththuvittaal.
Andha nenjaththai un kaiyyil
Koduthidavaa.

Kaaththirukka ninaikka
Kadhalikka thudikka
Unnai kaiygalukkul Katti
Naalum vilikka.
Vaa penne vilayaadu
Indha manjam meedhu
Ne kudiyeru.

Kaththai kaththaiyaaga
Oru mulu mulu meththai.
Meththai meedhu kaattiduven
Kattrukonda viththai.

Aththai aval pettreduththa
Vilaiyillaa muththai
Muththam ondru thandhu
Ezhupiduven soththai.

Aye aye aye
Aye aye aye
Neethaan en kadhal endru sollava

Aye aye aye
Aye aye aye
Unnai mattum naanum allikollavaa

Adi ne sellum podhu
En kadhal theeraadhu.
Ne enai vittu sendraal
En nenjam thaangaadhu.

Uyir ponaalum poga
Ne ennodu vazha
Veeye venum
Endre nenjam solludhey.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Aye Aye Aye'?

The song conveys a lively expression of love and attraction, celebrating the joy of being in love.

What is the context of this song in the movie Aambala?

In Aambala, the song showcases the lead characters' playful romance, enhancing the film's energetic vibe.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung and composed by Hip Hop Tamizha, known for their unique style and catchy tunes.

When was 'Aye Aye Aye' released?

The song was released on December 27, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Aye Aye Aye, the vibrant energy of Hip Hop Tamizha's music resonates with the youthful spirit of love and attraction. The song captures the playful dynamics between the characters, making it a perfect fit for celebratory occasions. With its upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics, it evokes feelings of joy and excitement. This dance number stands out as a highlight in the film Aambala, inviting listeners to join in the fun.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Aye Aye Aye from Aambala is a vibrant celebration of love and energy, brought to life by the dynamic beats of Hip Hop Tamizha. This dance number perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance, making it an instant party anthem. Get ready to groove as the infectious rhythm and catchy lyrics take you on a joyous ride!
stanzaMeanings: I searched for true love in this world. Here are the girls who can mesmerize you, and seeing you, I also fell for you.
Girls are all fake, there is no love for me. If you don't say anything, will I not live?
Seeing you, my heart is filled with love.
Aye aye aye, will you say that you are my love?
Aye aye aye, can I have only you?
When you speak, my love does not fade. If you leave me, my heart cannot bear it.
Even if my life goes away, I want you to live with me. My heart says that I need you.
Will my heart take care of you if I only look at you?
When you look at me, will your eyes not capture my heart?
In this night where we are together, there is a sweetness. Is it not the time for me to come to you?
When I talk about you, my heart dances. The love that blows over me will change my heart like cotton.
Even if you say enough, my heart will still think about you. Come, let love happen.
Aye aye aye, will you say that you are my love?
Aye aye aye, can I have only you?
When you speak, my love does not fade. If you leave me, my heart cannot bear it.
Even if my life goes away, I want you to live with me.
I want to think of only you. If my thoughts are healed, will that heart be given to you?
Waiting to think, love begins to stir. I will tie you in my hands and call you every day. Come, girl, play on this bed and stay with me.
I will show you a full, round fruit. I will place it on the fruit tree.
She will not give a price for the fruit she has picked. I will give one kiss and raise a ruckus.
Aye aye aye, will you say that you are my love?
Aye aye aye, can I have only you?
When you speak, my love does not fade. If you leave me, my heart cannot bear it.
Even if my life goes away, I want you to live with me.
